text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF 27 CCW Chronic Conditions (CC) File Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.3 83 

STROKE_TIA_EVER 

LABEL: Date that beneficiary first met claims criteria for the stroke indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the Chronic Condition 
Warehouse (CCW) stroke / transient ischemic attack (TIA) indicator. The variable will be blank for 
beneficiaries that have never had the condition.
